title: Final gate + v2.0.0 release: batched Gemini review + per-file >=90% coverage gate + version bump + final CHANGELOG entry + annotated tag v2.0.0 (local-only)
scope: scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs (NEW); packages/cli/package.json + packages/server/package.json + packages/shared/package.json + (any other) packages/*/package.json (version bump 2.0.0-rc.1 → 2.0.0); CHANGELOG.md (final v2.0.0 release notes); /tmp/rc4-review-prompt.md (transient — Gemini review prompt); .workflow/.lite-plan/fabric-v2-rc4-impl-2026-05-10/code-review.md (NEW — final review evidence + acceptance check)
description: Final rc.4 batched gate (per user MEMORY.md feedback_review_batching). (1) Author scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs mirroring rc2/rc3 gate scripts with ALLOWLIST scoped to NEW source files in rc.4 (doctor.ts new lint check region, review.ts TASK-006 helpers, install/skills-and-hooks.ts new installFabricImportSkill, cli/commands/doctor.ts new --apply-lint flag, fabric-import skill is markdown only — not gated). (2) Run the full rc.4 series test + coverage suite; verify per-file >=90 lines/statements/functions, >=80 branches; run rc4-coverage-gate.mjs exits 0. (3) Pipe full rc.4 diff (HEAD~9..HEAD) + key sources to Gemini via `cat /tmp/rc4-review-prompt.md | gemini --model gemini-2.5-pro`; capture verdict; address Critical issues; document Medium/Low dispositions in code-review.md. (4) Bump packages/*/package.json versions: 2.0.0-rc.1 → 2.0.0 (drop -rc suffix); run pnpm scripts/sync-versions.mjs (if applicable); pnpm install to update lockfile. (5) Add final CHANGELOG.md entry: `## [v2.0.0] — 2026-05-11` block with release notes (already drafted in TASK-008 — TASK-010 finalizes date + adds Gemini-review-fix bullet if applicable). (6) `git tag -a v2.0.0 -m "Fabric v2.0.0 — knowledge sustainment protocol stable release"` — annotated, LOCAL ONLY, no push. (7) Final acceptance-check pass: 12 handoff criteria + 1 orchestrator-added coverage gate = 13 criteria, all PASS or PARTIAL with rationale.

files.change: Mirror scripts/rc3-coverage-gate.mjs: read coverage-summary.json from each package; ALLOWLIST scoped to NEW rc.4 files: 'packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts' (rc.4 lint region), 'packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts' (TASK-005 added installFabricImportSkill region), 'packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts' (TASK-003 --apply-lint flag region); thresholds: lines/statements/functions >= 90, branches >= 80; non-allowlisted files report-only; exit 0 on PASS, 1 on FAIL with detailed message.
Bump version from `2.0.0-rc.1` to `2.0.0` (drop -rc suffix). Verify dependencies references to @fenglimg/fabric-shared follow same version bump.
Bump version from `2.0.0-rc.1` to `2.0.0`. Verify @fenglimg/fabric-shared dep version reference.
If packages/web/ exists: bump version 2.0.0-rc.1 → 2.0.0. If absent: skip.

files.target: v2.0.0 entry from TASK-008 — finalize date, add Gemini review summary if Critical fixes landed
files.change: Update v2.0.0 section header date to actual release date (2026-05-11); add bullet under 'Fixed' subsection summarizing any Gemini review Critical fixes if applicable; verify all 5 RC sections (rc.1, rc.2, rc.3, rc.4, v2.0.0) are in correct reverse-chronological order at top of file.

files.target: module body (markdown evidence document ~250-400 lines, mirrors rc.3 code-review.md shape)
files.change: Sections (per rc.3 precedent): (1) Scope — commit range HEAD~9..HEAD, file-level diff overview; (2) Coverage gate results — per-file thresholds, PASS/FAIL table, scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs exit code; (3) Gemini review summary — verdict (PASS / PASS-with-fixes / FAIL), issue counts by severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low), disposition table; (4) Critical/High issues + fixes applied (if any); (5) Medium follow-ups deferred to v2.1 + rationale; (6) Low follow-ups deferred + rationale; (7) rc.4 acceptance criteria — 12 handoff + 1 orchestrator coverage gate = 13 criteria, each verified PASS / PARTIAL / FAIL with evidence pointer; (8) rc.3 deferred items disposition (3 in scope to rc.4 — verified addressed; 2 deferred to v2.1 — verified still deferred); (9) v2.0.0 release verdict; (10) Tag command + tag message.

implementation: Author scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs by copying scripts/rc3-coverage-gate.mjs and updating ALLOWLIST to rc.4 NEW files: doctor.ts (TASK-001/002/003 region), skills-and-hooks.ts (TASK-005 added region), cli/src/commands/doctor.ts (TASK-003 --apply-lint flag region); thresholds match rc.3 (lines/statements/functions >= 90, branches >= 80)

Run full rc.4 test+coverage suite: `pnpm -r test --coverage`; collect coverage-summary.json per package; run `node scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs` — verify exits 0; if FAIL, root-cause and fix coverage gaps in services/doctor.ts new region OR skills-and-hooks.ts via additional unit tests in TASK-001/002/003/005 — file followup commits per task as needed before proceeding

Build /tmp/rc4-review-prompt.md: include rc.4 file-level diff (git diff HEAD~9..HEAD --stat + key file diffs) + key source files (services/doctor.ts new region, services/review.ts TASK-006 patches, install/skills-and-hooks.ts TASK-005 region, templates/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md, README.md, docs/knowledge-types.md, docs/initialization.md, docs/roadmap.md, CHANGELOG.md additions); target prompt size 60-100 KB (rc.3 was 76 KB)
Pipe to Gemini: `cat /tmp/rc4-review-prompt.md | gemini --model gemini-2.5-pro` — capture full output to /tmp/rc4-review-output.md

Parse Gemini verdict: extract issue count by severity, list Critical issues; for each Critical: assess applicability (rc.3 precedent: 1 Critical applied = path-traversal fix; 1 Critical disposition = misapplied allowed-tools convention); fix in code where applicable; document disposition where misapplied
Document Medium/Low dispositions: cheap fixes → patch in this task or open as v2.1 backlog with rationale; expensive fixes → DEFER to v2.1 with explicit decision_context tracking

Bump versions in package.json files: edit packages/cli/package.json + packages/server/package.json + packages/shared/package.json (and packages/web/package.json if exists) — change `"version": "2.0.0-rc.1"` to `"version": "2.0.0"`
Run pnpm scripts/sync-versions.mjs if it exists in repo (it does — verified at /Users/wepie/Desktop/personal-projects/pcf/scripts/sync-versions.mjs); cross-package dependency version refs auto-sync
Run `pnpm install` to update pnpm-lock.yaml with new versions
Run `pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test` — all green
Update CHANGELOG.md v2.0.0 entry: finalize date to 2026-05-11; add 'Fixed' subsection if Gemini review Critical fixes landed; verify reverse-chronological ordering
Author code-review.md: 10 sections per rc.3 precedent; populate from coverage-gate output + Gemini review verdict + acceptance check; final verdict 'PASS — v2.0.0 ready to tag'
Run final smoke test: `node scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs` exit 0; pnpm -r test all green; pnpm -r typecheck 0 errors

Create annotated tag: `git tag -a v2.0.0 -m "Fabric v2.0.0 — knowledge sustainment protocol stable release. Closes 4-RC v2.0 series (rc.1 clean rebrand; rc.2 archive loop; rc.3 review loop; rc.4 lint + import + docs). 4 MCP tools, 3 Skills, 3 client surfaces, lifecycle/lint moat, dual-root layout, audit-trail-by-default. NPM publish deferred per Q5; user can publish manually via pnpm publish."`; verify with `git tag -v v2.0.0`
DO NOT push tag; DO NOT npm publish (per convergence requirement and Q5 decision); confirm tag is local-only

Commit final changes (version bumps + CHANGELOG date finalization + code-review.md + scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs + any Gemini fix patches) as 'release(v2.0.0): final gate + version bump + tag (rc.4 TASK-010)'
Verify git log shows 10 atomic commits for rc.4 (TASK-001 through TASK-010); branch state clean; v2.0.0 tag local-only

reference.pattern: rc.2 + rc.3 final gate scripts/rc{N}-coverage-gate.mjs + code-review.md + Gemini review pipeline; rc.3 v2.0.0-rc.3 tag annotation pattern
reference.examples: rc.3 code-review.md (~340 lines, 10 sections, PASS verdict with 1 Critical fix landed); rc.3 v2.0.0-rc.3 annotated tag command + message style

criteria: scripts/rc4-coverage-gate.mjs exists and exits 0 on rc.4 NEW files (per-file >=90 lines/stmts/functions, >=80 branches)
Full test suite passes: `pnpm -r test` 0 failures across server / cli / shared / (web if applicable)
Gemini review executed; verdict captured in code-review.md; all Critical issues either fixed or disposition documented
All Medium/Low issues either fixed or DEFERRED to v2.1 with explicit rationale
If packages/web/package.json exists: version === '2.0.0' (verified or noted absent)
pnpm-lock.yaml updated to reflect new versions (verified by `git diff pnpm-lock.yaml` after pnpm install)
CHANGELOG.md v2.0.0 entry has finalized date 2026-05-11
code-review.md exists with 10 sections; final verdict 'PASS — v2.0.0 ready' or specific blocker named
code-review.md acceptance-check matrix: 12 handoff + 1 orchestrator coverage gate = 13 rows; 0 FAIL
Annotated tag v2.0.0 created locally (verified by `git tag -l v2.0.0` + `git tag -v v2.0.0`)
Tag is LOCAL ONLY: `git ls-remote --tags origin` does NOT show v2.0.0 (verified by absence)
NPM packages NOT published (verified by `npm view @fenglimg/fabric-cli versions` not showing 2.0.0 — or absent if pre-publish-state)
Git log shows 10 atomic rc.4 commits HEAD~9..HEAD; branch state clean (no untracked files except dogfood evidence)

rationale.chosen_approach: Single batched gate task at end (per user MEMORY.md feedback_review_batching); mirrors rc.2 + rc.3 final-task precedent; combines coverage gate + Gemini review + version bump + CHANGELOG finalize + tag in atomic conventional commit
alternatives_considered: Per-task Gemini review (review each TASK-001..009 commit independently) — rejected: explicit user MEMORY.md preference for batched review; rc.2/rc.3 precedent; per-task review costs ~10x in tokens

Skip Gemini review for v2.0.0 stable release (assume rc.3 + dogfood is sufficient) — rejected: rc.4 introduces 6 new doctor checks + new skill template + 4 docs files; review burden warrants dedicated pass
Push tag to remote — rejected: convergence requirement explicit ('local only — NO push'); user publishes manually if desired
Auto npm publish — rejected: Q5 decision; user-driven post-release
Commit version bump in earlier task (e.g., TASK-008) — rejected: bump should be the LAST act before tag; otherwise interim commits land with mismatched 2.0.0 version vs incomplete rc.4 state
decision_factors: User MEMORY.md preference for batched review
Version bump as final act ensures git log shows clean transition rc.1 → 2.0.0
Tag is local-only per convergence requirement (audit safety)
rationale.tradeoffs: Single large final commit; mitigated by atomic-commit-per-task convention treating final gate as one logical unit; reviewer reads code-review.md as the digest

manual_checks: Run pnpm -r test, pnpm -r typecheck — all green
Read code-review.md top-to-bottom — verify 10 sections, 13-row acceptance matrix, final verdict
Verify package.json versions: cat packages/{cli,server,shared}/package.json | grep version → all show 2.0.0
Verify tag: git tag -v v2.0.0 → annotated tag with message
Verify tag local-only: git ls-remote --tags origin | grep v2.0.0 → empty
Verify CHANGELOG.md v2.0.0 entry has correct date 2026-05-11
success_metrics: Gemini review verdict PASS or PASS-with-fixes (no FAIL)

risks.description: Coverage gate may FAIL if TASK-001/002/003 lint check tests don't sufficiently cover error paths
risks.mitigation: TASK-001/002/003 each include 8-12 unit tests scoped at >=90% target; TASK-009 dogfood exercises happy path; if gate FAILs at TASK-010, root-cause is missing test in earlier task — file followup commit before proceeding
risks.fallback: Add coverage tests in a 'fix(test): cover X branch (rc.4 TASK-010 gate)' commit before tag

risks.description: Gemini review surfaces a Critical that requires architectural change (e.g., schema unlock)
risks.mitigation: Schema unlocks already explicitly DEFERRED to v2.1; if Gemini surfaces such, document disposition (matches rc.3 'misapplied allowed-tools' precedent); only fix Critical if it's a genuine bug in rc.4 code (not a v2.1-scoped item)
risks.fallback: If unfixable Critical surfaces, do NOT tag v2.0.0; create rc.5 task instead and document

risks.description: Version bump may break inter-package dep refs (e.g., fabric-cli depends on workspace:^2.0.0-rc.1)
risks.mitigation: scripts/sync-versions.mjs handles this if it exists; verified at TASK-010 implementation step 8; pnpm install re-resolves; manual cross-check of @fenglimg/fabric-shared dep refs in fabric-server + fabric-cli
risks.fallback: Manually bump dep refs if sync-versions.mjs misses any

risks.description: Annotated tag with multi-line -m may have shell escaping issues
risks.mitigation: Use single-line -m message with semicolons OR use git tag -a -F /tmp/v2.0.0-tag-message.txt for multi-line; verify with `git show v2.0.0` after creation
risks.fallback: Delete and recreate tag if message corrupted

key_functions.purpose: Read coverage-summary.json per package, enforce ALLOWLIST per-file thresholds, exit 0/1
